R Notebook

Import the relevant data files

library(ECISR)
## Loading required package: tidyverse
## -- Attaching packages ---------------------------------------------------------------- tidyverse 1.2.1 --
## v ggplot2 3.1.0       v purrr   0.3.0  
## v tibble  2.0.1       v dplyr   0.8.0.1
## v tidyr   0.8.2       v stringr 1.4.0  
## v readr   1.3.1       v forcats 0.4.0
## -- Conflicts ------------------------------------------------------------------- tidyverse_conflicts() --
## x dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## x dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
byserumfree.df = ecis_import_long("HCMVEC/resample.abp", "HCMVEC/model.csv", "HCMVEC/by_treatment.csv")
## Warning: Column `Well` joining factor and character vector, coercing into
## character vector
byallfactors.df = ecis_import_long("HCMVEC/resample.abp", "HCMVEC/model.csv", "HCMVEC/with_growth_discriminated.csv")
## Warning: Column `Well` joining factor and character vector, coercing into
## character vector
bygrowthmedia.df = ecis_import_long("HCMVEC/resample.abp", "HCMVEC/model.csv", "HCMVEC/bygrowthmedia.csv")
## Warning: Column `Well` joining factor and character vector, coercing into
## character vector

First we plot out the growth phase as individual replicates

bygrowthmediadsubset.df = subset(bygrowthmedia.df, Time<50)
bygrowthmediadsubset.df = subset(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, Sample != "Grafton media only")
bygrowthmediadsubset.df = subset(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, Sample != "SBS media only")
forcm.df = subset(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, Time>1)


ecis_plot_all(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "R",4000)

ecis_plot_all(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "Rb",0)

ecis_plot_all(forcm.df, "Cm",0)

ecis_plot_all(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "Alpha",0)

ecis_plot_all(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "RMSE",0)

Then we plot out a summary

ecis_plot_summary(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "R",4000)
## Warning: Removed 2250 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "Rb",0)
## Warning: Removed 2250 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(forcm.df, "Cm",0)
## Warning: Removed 2204 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "Alpha",0)
## Warning: Removed 2250 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(bygrowthmediadsubset.df, "RMSE",0)
## Warning: Removed 2250 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

Now we look at the serum free portion

subbyserumfree.df = subset(byserumfree.df, Sample != "Media only")
serumarea.df = subset(subbyserumfree.df, Time>40)

ecis_plot_all(serumarea.df, "R", 4000)

ecis_plot_all(serumarea.df, "Rb", 0)

ecis_plot_all(serumarea.df, "Cm", 0)

ecis_plot_all(serumarea.df, "Alpha", 0)

ecis_plot_all(serumarea.df, "RMSE", 0)

Then we normalise it to remove a lot of the variation

normalserumarea.df = ecis_normalise(serumarea.df, 50, divide = FALSE)

ecis_plot_all(normalserumarea.df, "R", 4000)

ecis_plot_all(normalserumarea.df, "Rb", 0)

ecis_plot_all(normalserumarea.df, "Cm", 0)

ecis_plot_all(normalserumarea.df, "Alpha", 0)

ecis_plot_all(normalserumarea.df, "RMSE", 0)

Then we summarise the thing

ecis_plot_summary(normalserumarea.df, "R", 4000)
## Warning: Removed 18067 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalserumarea.df, "Rb", 0)
## Warning: Removed 18060 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalserumarea.df, "Cm", 0)
## Warning: Removed 18060 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalserumarea.df, "Alpha", 0)
## Warning: Removed 18060 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalserumarea.df, "RMSE", 0)
## Warning: Removed 18060 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

Finaly we look at if the two factors may have interacted by plotting out each well

byallfactorssubset.df = subset(byallfactors.df, Time > 40)

ecis_plot_summary(byallfactorssubset.df, "R", 4000)
## Warning: Removed 41296 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(byallfactorssubset.df, "Rb", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(byallfactorssubset.df, "Cm", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(byallfactorssubset.df, "Alpha", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(byallfactorssubset.df, "RMSE", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

Then we normalise the thing to try and reduce the variation

normalbyallfactors.df = ecis_normalise(byallfactorssubset.df, 50, divide = FALSE)

ecis_plot_summary(normalbyallfactors.df, "R", 4000)
## Warning: Removed 41296 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalbyallfactors.df, "Rb", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalbyallfactors.df, "Cm", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalbyallfactors.df, "Alpha", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).

ecis_plot_summary(normalbyallfactors.df, "RMSE", 0)
## Warning: Removed 41280 rows containing missing values (geom_errorbar).
